name: fs-sidebar-signature-rebuilt
description: 飞书多维表格侧边栏签名插件

scripts.test:image-preview: rm -rf .tmp-tests && tsc --target ES2020 --module CommonJS --moduleResolution Node --lib ES2020,DOM --skipLibCheck --esModuleInterop --allowSyntheticDefaultImports --outDir .tmp-tests src/imagePreview.ts tests/imagePreview.test.ts && printf '{"type":"commonjs"}\n' > .tmp-tests/package.json && node .tmp-tests/tests/imagePreview.test.js
